zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonas Nilsson於1620年出生在瑞典額斯特格特藍德斯亞寧時，他的父親Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke36歲，母親Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge21歲。他於1654年與Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson在美國德拉瓦州劍橋大學默里 卡素結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1693年10月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞金辛享年73歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞格洛麗亞 代 艾比斯可帕爾 邱奇 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonas Nilsson于1620年出生在瑞典額斯特格特藍德斯亞寧时，他的父亲Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke36岁，母亲Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge21岁。他于1654年与Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson在美国特拉华州劍橋大學默里 卡素结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1693年10月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞金辛享年73岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞格洛麗亞 代 艾比斯可帕爾 邱奇 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Nilsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Nils, Per, Anders, Egil, Lennart, Sven, Birgit, Fredrik, Sten, Algot.  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Gerhard, Gotthard, Karl-Heinz.
Swedish and German: patronymic from the personal name Nils, a shortened form of Nikolaus. Compare Nilson , Neilson 3, and Nielson 2.

variants.name: Nilson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Erik, Alvar, Holger, Kristoffer, Mats, Sven.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Nilsson  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Nilsen   and of Danish, Norwegian, or North German   Nielsen  , all cognates of 1. Compare   Nielson  .

nameMeanings.name: Jonas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Jonah , from the New Testament Greek form of the name. Both Jonah and Jonas were used by the Puritans, the latter from the 1560s at least.

historicEvents.description: Swedish warship Vasa sank in Stockholm harbor. 25 drowned.

historicEvents.title: The Thirty Years' War
historicEvents.description: King Gustavus Adolphus entered Sweden into the Thirty Years' War in 1630 with great success on the side of the German Protestants.
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list

Historical Boundaries: 1682: Pennsylvania, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1685: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States
King Charles II barred Jews from settling in Stockholm.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonas Nilsson was born in 1620, in Skänninge, Östergötland, Sweden, his father, Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke, was 36 and his mother, Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge, was 21. He married Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson in 1654, in New Castle, Delaware, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 October 1693, in Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, at the age of 73, and was buried in Gloria Dei Episcopal Church Burial Ground, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonas Nilsson est né en 1620, à Skänninge, Östergötland, Suède, son père, Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson en 1654, à New Castle, Delaware, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 octobre 1693, à Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Gloria Dei Episcopal Church Burial Ground, Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jonas Nilsson 1620 in Skänninge, Östergötland, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke 36 und seine Mutter Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge 21. Er hat 1654 in New Castle, Delaware, Vereinigte Staaten Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Oktober 1693 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America und wurde in Gloria Dei Episcopal Church Burial Ground, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonas Nilsson è nato il nel 1620 nel Skänninge, Östergötland, Svezia, il suo padre, Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson nel 1654, nel New Castle, Delaware, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 ottobre 1693, nel Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloria Dei Episcopal Church Burial Ground, Filadelfia, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonas Nilssonが1620年にスウェーデンoステルグoトランドスクaニンッジで生まれた時，父Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielkeは36歳，母Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglingeは21歳であった。1654年にアメリカ合衆国デラウェア州ニュー カストルでGertrude Svensdotter Gunnarssonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1693年10月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアキングセシングで73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアグロリア デイ エパスコプアル チャーチ ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonas Nilsson(이)가 1620년 스웨덴 o스터그o틀랜드 스ka닝에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1654년 미국 델라웨어 주 뉴 카스틀에서 Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1693년 10월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 킨그세징에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 그로리아 데이 피스코팔 c후르치 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonas Nilsson nasceu em 1620, em Skänninge, Östergötland, Suécia, seu pai, Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson em 1654, em New Castle, Delaware, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1693, em Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloria Dei Episcopal Church Burial Ground, Filadélfia, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonas Nilsson родился в 1620 г. в местности скaннинг, oстиргoтланд, Швеция, его отцу по имени Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson в 1654 г. в местности ню кастл, Делавэр, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 октября 1693 г. в местности кингсессинг, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности глоря ди эпископаль чурч буряль гроунд, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonas Nilsson nació en 1620, en Skänninge, Östergötland, Suecia, su papá, Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson en 1654, en New Castle, Delaware, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1693, en Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pensilvania, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Gloria Dei Episcopal Church Burial Ground, Filadelfia, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos.
